info.description: REST API for Knowledge Core (v1). JSON envelope: code (HTTP-style), message, data. 中文：Knowledge Core REST API（v1）；响应为 code、message、data 的 JSON 包装。
info.title: Knowledge Core HTTP API

get.description: List categories as a tree. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete an empty leaf category. Admin only.

get.description: List all documents for admin management.

post.description: Create a Markdown document and index metadata. Admin only.

get.description: Get a document by id. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete document metadata and Markdown file. Admin only.

patch.description: Update document metadata, content, tags, category, or status. Admin only.

get.description: List tags ordered by usage. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete an unused tag. Admin only.

get.description: List users with optional role, status, and keyword filters. Admin only.

parameters.description: Keyword filter for username or email
parameters.name: keyword

get.description: Get one user by id. Admin only.

delete.description: Soft-delete a user by setting status to disabled and revoking refresh tokens. Admin only.

patch.description: Update username, email, avatar, bio, status, or role. Admin only.

put.description: Reset another user's password and revoke that user's refresh tokens. Admin only.

post.description: Verify username and password, then issue access and refresh tokens.
Revoke one refresh token. Access tokens remain valid until their normal expiry.
Rotate a valid refresh token and issue a new token pair.
Create an active normal user account and sign in immediately.

get.description: List published documents with optional keyword, category, and tag filters.
Get a published document by id.
Return the authenticated user's public profile.

put.description: Update username, email, avatar, or bio for the authenticated user.
Verify the old password, set a new password, and revoke existing refresh tokens.
